goal: Translate the intake into an executable research plan for MP4 motion vector extraction and comparison.
definition_of_done: Project scope is clear; initial issue pack is coherent; first next actions for Symphony are obvious.
most_important_next_action: Clarify whether docs-only planning tickets may advance without GitHub checks or add a baseline CI workflow before moving HEL-147 out of In Progress.
request_summary: Turn the MP4 motion-vector intake into a concrete execution plan.
delivery_summary: Published the intake execution plan and aligned the core research/environment/input docs.
main_difficulty: The intake plan itself is complete, but the PR cannot satisfy the current review gate because this repo has no GitHub Actions workflows and therefore no remote checks.
next_step_summary: Decide whether to accept the docs-only PR without CI or add a minimal remote check so the issue can move to review cleanly.
